gate_question: Does this exact current protocol, with current live state, allow an unprivileged attacker to extract funds or rewards beyond entitlement?

candidate.title_or_claim: Missed-interval accumulation in swapTitanXForTorusAndBurn allows single caller to receive 1.5% of entire totalTitanXBurn pool as incentive
candidate.claimed_root_cause: _calculateIntervalsTitanXBurn accumulates missed intervals without per-call incentive ceiling; incentive is computed as 1.5% of the full capped allocation including all missed intervals
candidate.claimed_impact: Unprivileged attacker waits ~50 days of inactivity then calls swapTitanXForTorusAndBurn once to extract up to 1.5% of totalTitanXBurn (~5.85e27 TitanX) as incentive instead of the per-interval entitlement (~8.13e24 TitanX)

source_code_basis.why_it_matters: Accumulates missed intervals without ceiling: additionalAmount = amountPerInterval * missedIntervals; _totalAmountForInterval = amountPerInterval + additionalAmount; cap only prevents exceeding totalTitanXBurn, not limiting to a single interval
Incentive computed as 1.5% of full amountAllocated (which includes all accumulated missed intervals), then transferred to msg.sender at line 254 with no per-call ceiling
IntervalAlreadyBurned guard only prevents double-spending the same interval number; does not prevent a single call from sweeping all accumulated missed-interval allocation

INCENTIVE_FEE=150, BPS_DENOM=10000, INTERVALS_PER_DAY=144, INTERVAL_TIME=10 minutes confirm the arithmetic: per-interval allocation is 200/10000/144 of totalTitanXBurn; cap hits after 7200 missed intervals (~50 days)

attacker_path.actor: Any unprivileged EOA; no capital, no role, no oracle manipulation required
call_sequence: 1. Wait until block.timestamp - lastBurnedTitanXIntervalStartTimestamp >= 7200 * 600 (7200 intervals = 50 days of inactivity)
4. _calculateIntervalsTitanXBurn computes missedIntervals >= 7199, amountPerInterval * (missedIntervals+1) >= totalTitanXBurn, cap applied: currInterval.amountAllocated = totalTitanXBurn
state_before: titanXIntervalsBurn[53088+].amountBurned = 0 (no prior call for the new interval)
state_after: totalTitanXBurn reduced by currInterval.amountAllocated (= totalTitanXBurn, effectively zeroed)

extraction_analysis.asset_or_reward: TitanX tokens held by TorusBuyAndProcess contract (totalTitanXBurn pool)
extraction_analysis.attacker_gain: ~5.85e27 TitanX (1.5% of 390047518149437255354831991687) in a single transaction
extraction_analysis.victim_or_protocol_loss: Protocol burn pool loses 1.5% of totalTitanXBurn that should have been used to buy and burn Torus; remaining 98.5% is swapped and burned but the 1.5% incentive is extracted rather than burned
extraction_analysis.why_gain_exceeds_entitlement: Per-interval entitlement is 1.5% of one interval's allocation = totalTitanXBurn * 200/10000/144 * 150/10000 ≈ 8.13e24 TitanX. Attacker receives ~5.85e27 TitanX, approximately 720x the single-interval entitlement. The accumulation mechanism is designed to catch up missed intervals for the burn operation, but the incentive is incorrectly scaled to the full accumulated amount rather than capped at a single interval's incentive share.

local_proof_required.reject_if_assertion_fails: If incentiveReceived is bounded to a single interval's 1.5% share (~8.13e24 TitanX) rather than approaching totalTitanXBurn * 150 / 10000 (~5.85e27 TitanX), the claim is false and should be REJECTED.
